profile.headline: Senior Mathematics & Physics Specialist
profile.about: With over 15 years of academic experience, I specialize in simplifying complex scientific concepts. My goal is to transform "I can't do math" into "I love problem-solving." I've helped 500+ students achieve top grades in Cambridge/Edexcel ALs.
